arts.ttl: Brutal Nuri Sahin call made months after Celtic suffered Borussia Dortmund nightmare
arts.sum: It needs to be noted that Celtic and Dortmund could yet play each other in the Champions League. That was the Serie A side’s first win in the Champions League this season and it has resulted in Dortmund, who 13th in the standing, before Wednesday’s games can be played, sacking Sahin as their manager less than 24 hours later in a brutal fashion.

arts.ttl: Young Boys boss coughs up Celtic team 'leak' from inside Parkhead as UCL rivals reveal left-field plan
arts.sum: The 51-year-old is aiming to leave no stone unturned in his quest to ressuciatate the Swiss champions

arts.ttl: What we spotted from final Celtic training session before crunch Young Boys Champions League tie
arts.sum: Ex-striker Sutton feels it’s Celtic ‘s biggest match in a “long time” as there is so much riding on the points following some crucial Champions League results last night. It’s Champions League action for Celtic this evening and one of the biggest games of their season so far.

arts.ttl: Kyle Vassell states what Celtic fans were doing in the stands during win v Kilmarnock
arts.sum: That is because Kilmarnock went man-for-man and Vassell, even though he wasn’t on the pitch, explained that he loves that kind of tactic, as he told Open Goal. Somehow, Celtic went into the break level, before Daizen Maeda scored the winner and Kyle Vassell, who is Kilmarnock’s captain, shared an interesting insight into it all.

arts.ttl: Watch Ramon Vega slap down Jamie O'Hara's 'problem' with ex-Celtic boss Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham
arts.sum: Ramon Vega points out Tottenham’s ‘problem’ and it’s not with ex-Celtic boss Ange Postecoglou As pressure ramps up at Tottenham, Celtic cult hero Ramon Vega took issue with former Spurs player, Jamie O’Hara’s ‘problem’ with the Premier League manager.

arts.ttl: Emery issues Celtic message as he rages at Aston Villa's Champions League defeat to Monaco
arts.sum: Unai Emery rages as Aston Villa blow top-eight chances in the Champions League On some players not following his plan and elaborating on it, Emery then points to his head: “We want it and we need it,” added the Villa manager on the mentality of not being strong enough.”

arts.ttl: “We’ll see what happens” – Excited player aware of Celtic interest, sounds up for move
arts.sum: Celtic are apparently working on improving their attack in the winter market to provide Brendan Rodgers better options for the second half of the season. The Scottish Premiership champions have already been linked to a few forwards and the list includes BK Häcken’s Zeidane Inoussa. arts.ttl: The results Celtic need to reach Champions League knockouts TONIGHT as Man City and PSG eat each other up
arts.sum: The stage is set and Celtic know exactly what they need to do in their hunt to reach the knockouts

arts.ttl: Champions League preview: Celtic v Young Boys
arts.sum: We preview Celtic’s crunch Champions League match with Young Boys Bern.

arts.ttl: From big moments to big worries - what's the script with Celtic's Idah?
arts.sum: Adam Idah produced more than one heroic moment during his loan spell with Celtic last season, received a hero's welcome when he made the permanent switch, but, so far, he's struggling to reach the same heights.
